mapper.insert: insert into stock_tb (product_id, size_id, color_id, count, updated_at, is_sold_out) values (#{productId}, #{sizeId}, #{colorId}, #{count}, now(), if(#{count}=0, 1, 0))
mapper.select: select s.stock_id as stockId, s.product_id as productId, s.size_id as sizeId, z.size_name as sizeName, s.color_id as colorId, c.color_name as colorName, s.count as count, s.is_sold_out as isSoldOut, s.updated_at as updatedAt from stock_tb s inner join size_tb z on z.size_id = s.size_id inner join color_tb c on c.color_id = s.color_id where s.product_id = #{productId} order by s.stock_id desc
mapper.update: update stock_tb set count = #{count}, is_sold_out = if(#{count}=0, 1, 0), updated_at = now() where stock_id = #{stockId}
mapper.select: select size_id, size_name from size_tb order by size_id asc
select color_id, color_name from color_tb order by color_id asc
